title: Preview Manifest
description: Character anchor images and scene sample images produced by the preview stage. Once approved, character and scene descriptions are locked for the generate stage.

character_anchors.description: Character anchor (three-view) images and locked descriptions

image_path.description: File path to the character anchor image (three-view sheet)

anchor_description.description: The locked character description used for consistent generation

views.description: Views included in the anchor image

approved.description: Whether the user approved this character anchor

image_path.description: File path to the scene sample image

template_prefix.description: The locked scene template prefix for consistent generation

characters_included.description: Character names shown in this scene sample

approved.description: Whether the user approved this scene sample

prompt_templates.description: Locked prompt templates combining style_lock + character_anchor + scene_template patterns

pattern.description: Template pattern string where {style}, {character}, {scene} are placeholders

example_filled.description: One example of the template filled with actual values

style_lock.description: Style keywords carried forward from style_decision (immutable)
